2606.28013.title: The Signal-Coverage Matrix: Stratifying Type and Semantic Errors in Statement Autoformalization
2606.28013.paper_summary: Headline type-correctness (TC\%) of LLM autoformalization has climbed from $\sim$53\% to $\sim$76\% in two years, yet this scalar conceals which errors each method resolves. We propose a signal-coverage matrix that crosses the Lean elaborator (pass/fail) with a semantic-equivalence judgment (equivalent/not), sorting every output into one of four cells: true success (TS), type-only (TO), semantic-only (SO), or both fail (BF). On ProofNet\# and MiniF2F-test with DeepSeek V4-Pro across Vanilla, Lean-Retry, Sample-Filter, and Stratified Autoformalization (SAF): (1) the +34 to +36 TS gain across the three elab-feedback methods is $\sim$64\% type-stratum recovery, with SO flat on net (87.5\% of original semantic errors rescued, 8 newly created). (2) The TO-to-TS rate is 23/61 for each method (Wilson 95\% CI [26.6\%, 50.3\%]), and this stratum-level recovery rate predicts $Δ$TS on held-out methods to within 2/186 and renders $Δ$TC linear in the Vanilla elab-fail rate across six (model, dataset) cells ($R^2=0.96$). (3) The two judges disagree by 26 to 37 pp on elab-feedback outputs (vs. 7 pp on Vanilla), with 30 to 56\% of symbolic-judge false negatives traceable to elaborator-forced rewrites. The persistent residual reduces to two gold-formalization errors. TC\% gains should be credited by which cell moved, not by the scalar alone.
2606.28013.paper_summary_zh: 標題類型正確性 (TC\%) 的 LLM 自動形式化在兩年內從 $\sim$53\% 上升至 $\sim$76\%，然而這個數值隱藏了每種方法所解決的錯誤。我們提出了一個信號覆蓋矩陣，將 Lean elaborator（通過/失敗）與語義等價判斷（等價/不等價）交叉，將每個輸出分類到四個單元格中的一個：真正成功 (TS)、僅類型 (TO)、僅語義 (SO) 或雙方失敗 (BF)。在 ProofNet\# 和 MiniF2F-test 上，使用 DeepSeek V4-Pro 進行 Vanilla、Lean-Retry、Sample-Filter 和 Stratified Autoformalization (SAF)：(1) 三種 elab-feedback 方法的 TS 增益為 +34 到 +36，約為 $\sim$64\% 的類型層次恢復，SO 在淨值上持平（救回 87.5\% 的原始語義錯誤，創造 8 個新錯誤）。(2) 每種方法的 TO 到 TS 比率為 23/61（Wilson 95\% CI [26.6\%, 50.3\%]），這一層次恢復率預測在保留方法上的 $Δ$TS 以 2/186 的範圍內，並使 $Δ$TC 在六個（模型，數據集）單元格中的 Vanilla elab-fail 率呈線性關係 ($R^2=0.96$)。 (3) 兩位評審在 elab-feedback 輸出上意見不合，差異為 26 到 37 pp（相比 Vanilla 的 7 pp），其中 30 到 56\% 的符號評審假陰性可追溯至 elaborator 強制重寫。持續的殘差減少到兩個金標準形式化錯誤。TC\% 的增益應該根據哪個單元格移動來計算，而不僅僅是根據數值。
2606.28013.author: Chengxiao Dai et.al.
2606.28013.authors: Chengxiao Dai, Zhaokun Yan, Zhanhui Lin
